title: Recipe chain validation — dnaa-02 PASSES both gates
caption: Trajectory under recipe dnaa_02_with_extrinsic_target_rate (walks v2ecoli_baseline → dnaa_01g_calibrated → this). Total DnaA = 707 (in literature band); ATP fraction = 0.232 (in Boesen band). Validates the cascading-recipe architecture end-to-end.
